title: dianthus urumoffii
intro: Dianthus urumoffii, also known as Balkan pink, is a flowering plant species native to the Balkan Peninsula in southeastern Europe. The medicinal properties of Dianthus urumoffii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. This plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and as a treatment for digestive issues. Dianthus urumoffii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in herbal remedies such as salves and tinctures.
